code: import React,{useState}from'react';import'./Contact.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Contact=()=>{const[formData,setFormData]=useState({name:'',email:'',message:''});const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();alert('Thank you for contacting us!
